case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. STUTTGART COLLISION INC et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT STUTTGART COLLISION INC BAKOS, OMAR DOES ONE THROUGH TEN, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-23-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-25-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-08-2005

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STUTTGART COLLISION INC BAKOS, OMAR $3,636.26 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,636.26, IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AND ADJUDGED THAT TRINITY CAPITAL CORP. IS THE OWNER OF THE LEASED EQUIPMENT DESCRIBED AS ONE GARMAT HEATED DOWNDRAFT PAINT BOOTH MODEL 	9877 WITH 58 COLOR CONNECTED LIGHTBULBS, SIDE SERVICE DOOR AND 7'10"X12'10" PAINT MIX ROOM W/DIRECT ACCESS TO PAINT BOOOTH, W/IMMEDIATE RIGHT TO POSSESSION THERE.-SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
